articles.title: Why You Should Start Paying Attention To Football Fan Tokens

articles.title: 51% of Ethereum Blocks Can Now Be Censored. It’s Time for Flashbots to Shut Down
articles.description: More and more Ethereum blocks are being produced by censorious MEV-Boost relays, the most notable of which is Flashbots. If it really has Ethereums best interests at heart, perhaps the MEV organization should consider winding down its operations until developers can implement a long-term solution. articles.title: Algorand DeFi Is Booming. Here’s Why
articles.description: Crypto investment firm Hivemind deploying $25 million into Algorand DeFi is one of several catalysts attracting liquidity to the Layer 1 chain. articles.title: Judge Presiding Over $1 Trillion Tether Lawsuit Dismisses Roche Freedman From Representing Plaintiffs: Bloomberg Report
articles.description: Summary: A New York Judge has ordered that law firm Roche Freedman step down as lead counsel in a class action lawsuit against USDT Issuer Tether and its sister firm Bitfinex. The lawsuit sought $1 trillion in damages for the plaintiffs over alleged market manipulation by the digital asset firm.
